text_input: Write a blog post introduction (3-4 sentences) announcing our company's new AI-powered customer support chatbot, aimed at small business owners who are skeptical of automation replacing human support.
Draft a product description for a stainless steel insulated water bottle, 32oz, keeps drinks cold for 24 hours. Target audience: outdoor enthusiasts and hikers. Tone: energetic and adventurous.
Write a LinkedIn post (under 200 words) from a VP of Engineering announcing that their team just shipped a major platform migration with zero downtime, thanking the team.
Compose a marketing email subject line and body promoting a 20%-off end-of-season sale for a home goods e-commerce store. Keep the tone warm and low-pressure.
Write a short press release opening paragraph announcing a Series B funding round of $40 million for a climate-tech startup building carbon capture hardware.
Write an Instagram caption for a photo of a cozy coffee shop's new autumn menu, including pumpkin spice latte and maple scones. Keep it playful with light use of emoji.
Draft the opening section of a whitepaper on the benefits of zero-trust security architecture for mid-sized enterprises transitioning from legacy VPN infrastructure.
Write a video script hook (first 15 seconds) for a YouTube tutorial teaching beginners how to set up a home espresso station on a budget.
Write a job posting summary paragraph for a Senior Data Engineer role at a fast-growing fintech startup, emphasizing remote-first culture and equity compensation.
Compose a birthday toast speech (short, heartfelt) for a close friend turning 30, referencing their love of travel and their recent career change into teaching.
Write a product launch announcement for a new noise-cancelling headphone model, highlighting 40-hour battery life and adaptive sound modes, targeted at frequent business travelers.
Draft a customer newsletter section recapping three new features shipped this month in a project management SaaS tool: recurring tasks, calendar sync, and dark mode.
Write a short story opening (one paragraph) set in a rainy coastal town, introducing a retired lighthouse keeper who notices something unusual in the water.
Write an FAQ answer explaining, in plain language, how a company's new subscription tier pricing works and what happens to existing customers on the old plan.
Compose a tweet thread opener (first 2 tweets) making the case that remote-first companies produce better documentation than office-first companies.
Write a restaurant menu description for a seasonal autumn dish: butternut squash risotto with sage brown butter and toasted hazelnuts.
Draft an internal all-hands announcement introducing a new VP of Sales, covering their background and what they'll focus on in their first 90 days.
Write ad copy (three short variations) for a mobile app that helps users track and reduce their monthly subscription spending.
Write the introduction to a how-to guide teaching intermediate home cooks how to properly sear and rest a steak for consistent results.
Compose a thank-you note template for customers who just completed their first purchase from a small independent bookstore's online shop.
